mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MSF_REQUEST_CANCEL ( REQUEST_KEY, CRET_IP, CRET_DT, CRET_ID, AMD_IP, AMD_DT, AMD_ID, MANAGER_CD, AGENT_CD, SHOP_CD, SHOP_NM, REAL_SHOP_NM, CPNT_ID, CNTPNT_SHOP_CD, OPER_TYPE_CD, CSTMR_TYPE_CD, CANCEL_MOBILE_NO, CONTRACT_NUM, SCAN_ID, AUTH_INFO, IDENTITY_TYPE_CD, IDENTITY_ISSU_DATE, IDENTITY_ISSU_REGION, DRIVE_LICNS_NO, RECEIVE_WAY_CD, CANCEL_USE_COMPANY_CD, PAY_AMT, PNLT_AMT, LAST_SUM_AMT, INSTAMT_MNTH_CNT, INSTAMT_MNTH_AMT, BENEFIT_AGREE_YN, CLAUSE_CNTR_DEL_YN, ETC_AGREE_YN, MEMO, REG_DATE, REGST_ID, REG_DT, PROC_CD, REC_YN, RES_CD, RES_MSG, RES_NO, APP_FORM_YN, APP_FORM_XML_YN, FILE_NM, FILE_MASK_NM ) VALUES ( #{requestKey}, #{cretIp}, NOW(), #{cretId}, #{amdIp}, NOW(), #{amdId}, #{managerCd}, #{agentCd}, #{shopCd}, #{shopNm}, #{realShopNm}, #{cpntId}, #{cntpntShopCd}, #{operTypeCd}, #{cstmrTypeCd}, #{cancelMobileNo}, #{contractNum}, #{scanId}, #{authInfo}, #{identityTypeCd}, #{identityIssuDate}, #{identityIssuRegion}, #{driveLicnsNo}, #{receiveWayCd}, #{cancelUseCompanyCd}, #{payAmt}, #{pnltAmt}, #{lastSumAmt}, #{instamtMnthCnt}, #{instamtMnthAmt}, #{benefitAgreeYn}, #{clauseCntrDelYn}, #{etcAgreeYn}, #{memo}, TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), #{regstId}, NOW(), #{procCd}, #{recYn}, #{resCd}, #{resMsg}, #{resNo}, #{appFormYn}, #{appFormXmlYn}, #{fileNm}, #{fileMaskNm} )
